Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Hello, young man. Say...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Have you heard anything about those mysterious cases of ordinary, healthy people changing overnight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Guess that shouldn't be a surprise. It's all over TV.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Hey, you don't sound concerned at all![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}How can you not know about this? You live here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Another victim of those mysterious incidents was found at Gekkoukan High.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Since the victim was at the front gate, that must be the scene of the crime.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}If the victim was attacked somewhere else, they'd have to be carried to the front gate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}But why would the culprit do such a thing? The reasoning doesn't add up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Anyway, there's a high probability that Gekkoukan itself is involved in all this somehow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I'm getting shut out on this case of the Gekkoukan student...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}There weren't any eyewitnesses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}No one heard so much as a scream.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}It's like nothing ever happened... Or at least no one will admit to knowing anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}They just brush it off as a "tragic case of juvenile crime"... But I think this goes deeper.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}It happened again! I got warned by my boss just for gathering info![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I was out looking into Mr. Kirijo and Mr. Ikutsuki's relationship, and the boss called me off![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I asked him why, and all he gave me was the usual bull about the higher-ups not liking it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}But this pattern... It's similar to the Gekkoukan student incidents.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}There's something else behind all this, I'm sure of it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A perfectly healthy person becoming mentally ill overnight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}There's no family history of it, and they haven't been in any terrible accidents.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}There wasn't even any similarity to the last victims. It was a different time, in a different place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}This is one tough mystery, you know that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}But I'm gonna solve it. I will solve it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I hear there's a growing movement on the Internet these days...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I don't know what it's called, but this one guy is gathering lots of users around him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I'm not sure what he's up to or why, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}He's not just being over-hyped. This guy definitely knows what he's doing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Maybe I should check him out sometime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's such a cliché for adults to complain about how young people look and act...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}You see articles about it all the time on what's corrupting the youth these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}But that guy kinda begs that question...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I'm talking about a young man I saw on the street while doing a story. Long hair, bare upper body, tattoos on both arms...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}You see a person like that and it makes you wonder if the youth really are being corrupted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}The number of victims of those mysterious incidents is increasing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Have you noticed the pattern to the victims so far?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Based on what's happened so far, they increase one week before every full moon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}And once the full moon is over, they all disappear. That's all we know so far.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}This mystery... It's related to the full moon, I know it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}All those Apathy Syndrome victims make me worried. If you look at what's really going on...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}It's spreading through the entire country, with more and more victims all the time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I wouldn't be surprised if there's a major policy meeting about this soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}My investigation into the death of the Gekkoukan student was called off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}The higher-ups... They must have heard about me looking into it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}The very higher-ups my boss kept warning me about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Just like the mystery doesn't take holidays, we reporters can't take holidays either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}And I think I'm close to a real breakthrough on this one...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I can't take a break when I'm this close.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Asking around is the basic method of gathering information, but it's not going so well this time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}So, how about it? Got any info on the mysterious incident?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}If you have any information, I can reward you for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}You've got kind of a mysterious aura, so I thought you might know something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Can't you tell by looking at me? I'm a journalist.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I'm trying to bust this incident wide open for the public.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}That's strange... I don't see any old ladies around here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Just one beautiful reporter, bravely investigating the mysterious incidents here in town.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I saw a girl in a white, frilly dress in front of the station...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}It was a beautiful dress, and it offset her stunning red hair so well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}That gothic lolita style is hard to pull off, but she had it down perfectly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Maybe I should say hi to her when I see her next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}The mysterious incidents happen at midnight... I'm positive of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I've been checking around, and everything seems to occur then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Healthy people get Apathy Syndrome at midnight, and the first victim was taken at midnight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}There's something very suspicious going on around that time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}When I was looking into Mr. Kirijo's death, there's one thing that bothered me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}The chairman of the board, Shuji Ikutsuki. He was found dead on the same day as Mr. Kirijo...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}And he must have known Mr. Kirijo since they were in the Kirijo Group together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}There's got to be some connection...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I looked into those people who are waiting for "the End"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I think they have something to do with the victims of those mysterious incidents.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Which means the Apathy Syndrome victims and these people have something in common.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Then right when everyone started talking about this "End," this cult appears...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Maybe they know something about all this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Or it could be that they're just using the situation to gain followers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Asking around is the basic technique for gathering information, no matter how creepy the story is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}So, how about it? Got any info on the mysterious incident?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I see... How disappointing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}You've got a mysterious aura about you, so I thought you might know something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Can't you tell by looking at me? I'm a journalist.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I'm trying to bust this incident wide open for the public.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}The woman is smiling tightly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}The victims of Apathy Syndrome can never get their normal lives back...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Do you think that's true or not?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}That's what a lot of people think, but it's not true.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}The symptoms of the syndrome vary from person to person, according to my hard-won information.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Unconsciousness, loss of vitality, aphasia, mental decline...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}However, some only got minor symptoms and are back to a normal life already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Interviewers can't rely only on primary sources. Eyewitness reports are important, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}My favorite part of gathering information is all the unique people I get to meet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}For example, the other day I talked to a young man who spoke in a Kansai dialect.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}That isn't something you hear every day around here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Hmmm, strange. The victims from that incident aren't going away...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Usually, they disappear after the full moon, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Maybe something's changed and I didn't notice?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Well, whatever it is, it doesn't seem good...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Mr. Kirijo passed away. Officially, it was from an illness, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I'd be no reporter if I just believed the official story![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}There's something going on here... I heard a rumor that it might have been murder.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}There was a magazine profile on the founder of that cult.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}But I don't think it's worth all the attention...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}It's just a little club that some kids made up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}I've got a scoop! These incidents all started with that god in the shrine's curse![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}...Sounds ridiculous, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}Our rag mainly covers these kinds of things. We're just a third-rate "yellow" publication, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}One day, I'll get a scoop that'll take us to number one![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}My boss tells me not to waste my time, though... He thinks it's impossible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}You don't have to lie to make me feel better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}But that's very open-minded of you... I'm impressed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}A Gekkoukan student was killed... Hmmm...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}This is the kind of incident that makes the headlines.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 402}The higher-ups told me to gather information, so here I am... But these kinds of cases aren't my thing.[n]{f 1 1}
